promotion.blocker: Apache AGE does not currently build against PostgreSQL 18.4 in the WASIX lane; ag_label.c still calls ExecInitExtraTupleSlot, which is not available in PG18. Keep graph/pgGraph out of release artifacts until there is an official PG18-compatible upstream.

notes: promotion blocker: Apache AGE does not currently build against PostgreSQL 18.4 in the WASIX lane; ag_label.c still calls ExecInitExtraTupleSlot, which is not available in PG18. Keep graph/pgGraph out of release artifacts until there is an official PG18-compatible upstream.
